title: PF-10 Contractual Personnel Request Form (DocuSign)
content: DocuSign form used exclusively for revisions and continuation requests for existing grant-funded contractual personnel at Morgan State University. New employees must NOT be onboarded via PF-10; instead, use the EPAF system via WebSIS. Submitted to the MSU ORA signing group through DocuSign. Questions to ora-docusign@morgan.edu.
